4,820 likes, 92 comments - damienpichon_ le  July 5, 2026: "Mini cookies 🍪

Ingrédients

* 180 g de cassonade
* 125 g de beurre pommade
* 25 g d’œuf entier
* 175 g de farine T55
* 1,5 g de poudre à lever
* 2,5 g de sel fin

Choisissez votre saveur :

💚 Pistache

* Ajouter 40 g de pâte de pistache.

🤎 Spéculoos

* Ajouter 40 g de pâte de spéculoos.

🍫 Chocolat

* Remplacer 30 g de farine par 30 g de cacao en poudre non sucré.

Astuce : Je n’ajoute pas de pépites ou d’éclats de chocolat dans la pâte afin de faciliter la découpe et d’obtenir des mini cookies bien réguliers.

Préparation

1. Mélanger le beurre pommade, la cassonade et l’œuf.
2. Ajouter la farine, la poudre à lever et le sel (ou, pour la version chocolat, 145 g de farine + 30 g de cacao en poudre).
3. Incorporer la pâte de pistache ou la pâte de spéculoos selon la saveur choisie.
4. Former un boudin de pâte, filmer et réserver au réfrigérateur jusqu’à ce qu’il soit bien ferme.
5. Découper en fines rondelles.
6. Déposer les mini cookies sur une plaque recouverte de papier cuisson.
7. Cuire au four préchauffé à 175 °C pendant 10 minutes.

#cookies #pastry #recette #recipes".

19K likes, 286 comments - louishowardpt le  July 7, 2026: "“Super F*ck” Protein Brownies

These were a solid 9/10 from me.

Ridiculously fudgy, packed with protein, and honestly didn’t taste like a “healthy” brownie. Definitely one I’ll be making again.

Ingredients

* 80g plain flour
* 20g cocoa powder
* 65g chocolate protein powder
* 10g sweetener
* Pinch of salt
* 150ml egg whites
* 2 large eggs
* 100g cottage cheese
* 20g apple sauce
* 20ml maple syrup
* 5ml vanilla extract
* Optional chocolate chips

Cooking Steps

* Preheat oven to 180°C.
* Mix all the dry ingredients together.
* Blend the wet ingredients for around 10 seconds.
* Fold the wet mixture into the dry ingredients until you have a thick brownie batter.
* Pour into a lined baking tray.
* Bake for 12–15 minutes, depending on how fudgy you like them.
* Leave to cool completely (they’re even better after chilling in the fridge), then slice into 9 brownies.

Macros (per brownie)

* Calories: 99 kcal
* Protein: 11g
* Carbs: 8g
* Fat: 2g

Cheers: @mattwest_roadtoaesthetics".

197 likes, 8 comments - marie_sweetandsour le  June 29, 2026: "Pas de secrets, pas d’ingrédients bizarres, et surtout : zéro compromis sur l’onctuosité.
.
Quand on retire la crème et le lait animal, beaucoup s’imaginent qu’on se retrouve avec un sorbet à l’eau un peu triste. C’est tout l’inverse. En jouant sur les bons ingrédients d’origine végétale et la puissance de la Ninja Creami @ninja.france, on obtient une texture d’un soyeux absolu, ultra-riche !
.

INGRÉDIENTS (Pour 1 pot) :
• 350g de lait d’avoine
• 15g de fécule de maïs (Maïzena)
• 40g de sucre
• 30g chocolat blanc @linnolat_official
• 100g de purée de pistache non sucrée
.
1. Faire épaissir à feu moyen le lait d’avoine avec la fécule et le sucre, en fouettant en continu.
2. Hors du feu, ajouter le chocolat blanc et la purée de pistache. Bien émulsionner au fouet.
3. Verser dans le pot de la Ninja Creami et laisser toute la nuit au congélateur (ou placer en sorbetière). Turbiner et c’est prêt 👍🏼
.
Alors, surpris.e par la liste des ingrédients ? Est-ce que tu aurais deviné qu’elle était végétale juste au visuel ? Dis-le-moi en commentaire ! 💬
.
#ninjacreami #glacepistache #pistachioicecream #glacevegan".

873 likes, 139 comments - timeundertensionpt le  July 1, 2026: "✍️ Comment “STRAWBERRY” for our fresh strawberry compote recipe. 🍓🤫

High Protein, Strawberry Cheesecake Ice Cream
‼️ SAVE THIS RECIPE FOR LATER ‼️

WHAT YOU’LL NEED:
(Cheesecake Base)
1 pure protein vanilla shake
1 tbsp SF cheesecake Jello
1/4 tsp xanthan gum
1 tbsp monkfruit sweetener

(Base Alone)
CAL: 170
PROTEIN: 30g

INSTRUCTIONS:
1️⃣ Make your base. Blend shake, jello, monkfruit, xanthan gum.
2️⃣ Store in Creami container and keep upright in the freezer for 12 hours minimum.
3️⃣ Leave on counter to thaw for a few minutes.
4️⃣ Lite Ice Cream cycle.
5️⃣ Scrape sides down and respin cycle (if necessary).
7️⃣ Add in strawberry compote and graham crackers. Mix-in cycle.
8️⃣ Top with the remainder of your compote and two teaspoons of graham cracker crumbs (+20 cal). Enjoy.

(With Compote, Graham Crackers, Crumbs)
CAL: 298
PROTEIN: 31

➡️ If you’re trying to cut back on calories, but hate how miserable it feels to be hungry all the time.

➡️ If you’re someone with a huge appetite that loves to indulge in great tasting food.

➡️ If you want to learn how to eat big, stay full, lose weight, and keep it off for life.

535 likes, 10 comments - birdinadeficit le  July 3, 2026: "Tiramisu high-protein Ninja Creami.

I used my standard coffee as the base: 300ml of cafetière coffee with 60ml oat milk.

I added cottage cheese and cream cheese to replicate the mascarpone in a real tiramisu. This adds texture, protein, and creaminess.

Chocolate protein powder bulks up the mix, adding protein and thickness.

For the Mix in I used a fibre one brownie to trade out the tiramisu sponge for a higher-fibre alternative that still gives a cake-like result.

Topped with black cocoa for that tiramisu finish.

Full ingredients:

* 300ml cold brew coffee
* 60ml oat milk
* 100ml high-protein milk
* 80g cottage cheese
* 40g light Philadelphia
* 60g full-fat Greek yoghurt
* 40g chocolate whey
* Pinch of salt and xanthan gum

This fills a Deluxe tub. Halve everything if you have the standard tubs.

A lot of the ingredients can be increased or decreased to fit your macros as needed.

Macros:
421 cals
50g protein
15g fat
23g carbs

#ninjacreami #proteinicecream #highprotein #ninjacreamirecipe #healthydessert".

6,273 likes, 145 comments - eatspinni le  May 8, 2026: "No pudding mix. No xanthan gum. No fake sugar.

Just delicious protein Creamis flavored with clean, simple ingredients!

Welcome to the page 🍓 🍨

Check out our strawberry cheesecake recipe below!

(this is the first Creami from the video)

65g protein, no gums, no pudding mix.

RECIPE
- 6oz milk (whole milk for extra creaminess)
- 1/2 cup nonfat greek yogurt
- 1/4 cup cottage cheese
- 1/2 to 1 cup strawberries
- 2-3 tbsp maple syrup or honey
- 30g milk protein or whey
- 5-10g collagen (this is what makes it creamy without gums!)
- 2 tsp vanilla extract
- pinch of salt

INSTRUCTIONS
- blend ingredients together and freeze for 16 hours
- remove from freezer and let thaw for 15 min, or run hot water around the edge of the pint
- spin on lite ice cream setting
- respin 2-3x or until desired texture is reached

MACROS (entire pint)
- 575 cal | 65g protein | 65g carbs | 10g fat

What flavor do you want next? Let us know in the comments 👇

#ninjacreami #ninjacreamirecipes #healthyicecream #proteinicecream #nothingartificial".

1,287 likes, 19 comments - ezefitt le  May 31, 2026: "High Protein Dubai Chocolate Ice Cream 🍫🌴

Dubai’s viral chocolate bar walked so this high-protein pint could run 😭

Creamy vanilla ice cream loaded with crispy toasted kataifi, rich pistachio butter, and finished with a dark chocolate shell that cracks into every bite. It tastes like the famous Dubai chocolate dessert—but with enough protein to actually fit your goals 👀

⚡ Approx Macros (Entire Pint) ~450 Calories ~43g Protein ~18g Fat ~30g Carbs

🍦 What I Used: • 1¼ cups Fairlife Fat-Free Milk • 1 scoop @legion Vanilla Protein Powder
(Code: EZEFITT) • ¼ tsp xanthan gum • Pinch of salt

🍫 Mix-Ins: • 20g toasted kataifi shredded phyllo dough  • 2 tbsp melted pistachio butter

✨ Toppings: • 2 tbsp melted dark chocolate • 1 tsp melted pistachio butter • 1 tbsp Crushed pistachios (optional)

🥄 Ninja Creami Instructions: Freeze overnight → Spin on Light Ice Cream → Create a center hole → Add toasted kataifi and pistachio butter → Mix-In cycle → Top with melted dark chocolate, pistachio butter, and crushed pistachios, add to the freezer for 5 minutes.

🔥 The result? A crunchy, creamy, chocolate-pistachio masterpiece that tastes like a luxury dessert from Dubai while packing over 40g of protein.

#explore #highprotein #dubaichocolate #icecream #ninjacreami".

912 likes, 9 comments - timeundertensionpt le  June 11, 2026: "Snickers High Protein Ice Cream.
‼️ SAVE THIS RECIPE FOR LATER ‼️

WHAT YOU’LL NEED:
A Ninja Creami (link in bio to the one we use)
11 oz Vanilla Jocko MOLK
2 tbsp monkfruit sweetener
1 tbsp PB2 powder
1/4 tsp xanthan gum
1 tbsp caramel sauce
1 tbsp chopped peanuts
2 Snickers minis
1 tbsp zero sugar Hershey’s syrup.

INSTRUCTIONS:
1️⃣ Make your base. Blend protein shake, PB2 powder, xanthan gum, monkfruit sweetener.
2️⃣ Store in Creami container and keep upright in the freezer for 12 hours minimum.
3️⃣ Leave on counter to thaw for 5-10 min.
4️⃣ Lite Ice Cream cycle.
5️⃣ Scrape sides down.
6️⃣ Respin cycle.
7️⃣ Make a hole in the middle, add in peanuts and caramel sauce.
8️⃣ Fold in with spoon, top with Snickers and chocolate syrup. Enjoy.

CAL: 390
PROTEIN: 37g
